d7b_reasoning: The strategy describes a Bollinger band mean-reversion approach with volatility filter. However, the entry logic contains a critical flaw: it checks close <= bb_upper_24_2 rather than close <= bb_lower_24_2, which contradicts the stated intent of entering when price touches the lower band. This condition is nearly always true and does not capture oversold mean-reversion as described. The exit logic is coherent, with dual paths for either price crossing back to the SMA center with moderate RSI recovery or strong upside return with elevated RSI. The theme alignment is moderate because the description correctly articulates mean-reversion concepts (oversold bounce, band touches, snap-back), but the actual entry implementation fails to execute this. Structurally, the factor set {bb_upper_24_2, close, realized_vol_24h, return_24h, rsi_14, sma_24} is nearly identical to prior entry #64 which used exactly {bb_upper_24_2, close, realized_vol_24h, return_24h, rsi_14, sma_24}, differing only in threshold values and operators applied to the same six factors. This represents a shallow variant of an existing hypothesis.
